channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
The old way: → 3-5 days to settle → 3%+ fees → Closed evenings, weekends, and holidays
The new way:...
item.description:
The old way: → 3-5 days to settle → 3%+ fees → Closed evenings, weekends, and holidays
The new way: → $33T settled in stablecoins last year → Sub-cent fees → 24/7/365
The internet finally has real money. We built the stack.
--- @coinbase | ❤️ 45 | 🔁 4 | 💬 12 | 👁 5504
item.author: @coinbase

item.description:

item.author: @elonmusk

item.title:
Here’s the bottom line:
AI won’t be won by who moves fastest. It’ll be won by who governs best.
If...
item.description:
Here’s the bottom line:
AI won’t be won by who moves fastest. It’ll be won by who governs best.
If your data isn’t structured, contextualized, and controlled, scaling AI will only amplify problems.
I break this down in detail in my latest video with Collibra.
Check out the full article: https://t.co/G6PX8FzxjA
Or Comment or DM “GOVERNANCE” and I’ll share a practical setup tailored to your organization - so you can define the right governance model before you scale.
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 55
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
The real bottleneck isn’t models.
It’s unstructured data.
I saw a side-by-side demo that made this...
item.description:
The real bottleneck isn’t models.
It’s unstructured data.
I saw a side-by-side demo that made this obvious:
→ Raw data environment • lower accuracy • higher risk • inefficient outputs
→ Metadata-enriched environment • better decisions • faster results • measurable value
Same AI. Completely different outcomes.
The difference? Governance and structure.
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 64
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
Everyone thinks they’re scaling AI.
Most are just scaling chaos.
What I’m seeing, including in con...
item.description:
Everyone thinks they’re scaling AI.
Most are just scaling chaos.
What I’m seeing, including in conversations with @collibra, is a dangerous illusion
→ faster experimentation → more pilots → zero control
The gap between AI ambition and actual business value is widening.
Here’s what’s really going on…
#CollibraPartner
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 1 | 💬 2 | 👁 87
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon
